Socioeconomic impacts of permafrost degradation may also prove costly (Larsen et al. 2008). [REF:7].

**Key Findings**

- Carbon emissions from permafrost thaw and Arctic wildfires, which are not fully accounted for in global emissions budgets, will greatly redu... [REF:8]
